productDisplayName: Vans Unisex Classic Slip-On Blue Casual Shoes
description: A great slip-on shoe from vans, so comfortable, practical and durable you'll want to wear it every day. Built by skateboarders, for skateboarders, but loved by all for the perfect blend of classic cool and modern slick style. If you don't yet own a pair then this is a good place to start, and if you're already a Vans fan there's always room for one more great shoe in your closet. With a retro style checked upper, this slip on will coordinate with all your outfits, and the striped lining gives this shoe a little stylish lift. Upper Fabric uppers for durability and comfort Padded collar and textile lining for extra comfort Elasticated sides on the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feet Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
